## Summary

Describe the community or onboarding change and why it is needed.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Onboarding
- [ ] Working groups
- [ ] Roadmap
- [ ] Discussions
- [ ] Volunteer roles
- [ ] Issue templates

## Review Notes

- Contributor audience:
- Routing impact:
- Related working group:
- Related issue:

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No private student data, credentials, confidential partner documents, or private contact lists are included.
- [ ] Contributor routing is clear.
- [ ] The change does not duplicate content that belongs in data, standards, or governance repos.
